Description: esocial qualification deterministic CloudFormation template generated by scripts/templates-generate.mjs

EsocialEndpointHost.Description: eSocial endpoint host. Operators may override through ESOCIAL_QUALIFICATION_ENDPOINT_HOST.

EsocialDatabaseUrlSecretArn.Description: Secrets Manager ARN for the esocial database URL.

EsocialCertificateSecretPrefix.Description: Secrets Manager prefix for tenant certificate references.

Properties.Description: esocial qualification certificate secret encryption key

SecurityGroupEgress.Description: Outbound only; no SGP database ingress is allowed.

Properties.GroupDescription: esocial qualification database ingress from service lambdas

SecurityGroupIngress.Description: PostgreSQL from eSocial service compute only.

Properties.Name: esocial/qualification/database
Properties.Description: esocial/qualification/database reference placeholder; secret value is provisioned outside git.

Properties.Name: esocial/qualification/certificate/local-test-placeholder
Properties.Description: esocial/qualification/certificate/local-test-placeholder reference placeholder; secret value is provisioned outside git.

Source.BuildSpec:
version: 0.2
phases:
  build:
    commands:
      - npm run migrate:dev
